test.command: ssh root@192.168.1.198 "docker run --rm -v /opt/mi50grad:/opt/mi50grad mi50grad bash -c 'cd /opt/mi50grad && python3 tests/test_ngram_speculative.py && python3 tests/test_eagle_speculative.py && python3 tests/test_val_spec.py && python3 tests/bench_speculative_tp4.py'"

typecheck.command: ssh root@192.168.1.198 "docker run --rm -v /opt/mi50grad:/opt/mi50grad mi50grad bash -c 'cd /opt/mi50grad && python3 -m py_compile src/inference/speculative.py src/inference/generate.py src/inference/tp_engine.py'"

lint.command: n/a (no linting tools available in container)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add speculative decoding implementation details: NgramCache trie structure, EagleDraftHead reuse of lm_head weights, draft-verify loop algorithm, SpeculativeDecodeState integration with TPInferenceEngine
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three features implemented comprehensive speculative decoding infrastructure with full TP=4 integration

keyFindings: SpeculativeDecodeState class manages n-gram cache and acceptance stats
Greedy equivalence verified: output identical to standard decode
EagleDraftHead reuses lm_head weights for draft generation
Greedy equivalence verified: output identical to standard decode
Temperature sampling acceptance 0% (MH not implemented - non-blocking)
Fallback to standard decode works correctly

VAL-SPEC-001.evidence: NgramCache builds and queries trie correctly

VAL-SPEC-002.evidence: Edge cases handled: empty, short, large token IDs

VAL-SPEC-005.evidence: EagleDraftHead generates K valid draft tokens

VAL-SPEC-006.evidence: Logits FP32, valid range, argmax match

VAL-SPEC-007.evidence: EAGLE output identical to standard decode
